label: LC_3
evidence: The supplementary tables (e.g. Extended Data Table 2, Supplementary Table 5) in this atlas use the label 'LC_3' to denote the third identified cluster of Langerhans cells ('LC'). These are annotated as 'Langerhans cell 3' in cluster-to-name tables and figure legends, consistently referring to epidermal Langerhans cells. The main text and figures specify the tissue as skin (in both prenatal and adult context where indicated by scope parameter).
